segments.speaker: 题目4/5
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Excuse me, how may I help you? My brother's getting cooking lately, but I don't know what to get him. What do you suggest? How about a high quality chef's knife? We have a lot of options at different price points. I don't know if he needs one. I think he already has knives. Most home cooks start with a basic setup. A more professional knife makes food prep a lot easier, and it's something that most people wouldn't buy for themselves. I really want to treat him. How about that one?
